title: PoE Switch Port Power Draw Monitoring for CCTV Cameras
app: Custom TA (NVR REST/syslog), ONVIF pull, Hikvision ISAPI HEC, or Milestone connector mapped to listed sourcetypes
spl:
index=physical sourcetype="nvr:diagnostic" earliest=-24h
| eval poe_w=tonumber(coalesce(poe_power_w, port_power_draw_w, ""))
| eval port=coalesce(switch_port, ifDescr, "")
| where poe_w>25
| timechart span=1h max(poe_w) by port switch_name
description: IR-cut heaters and long cable runs spike PoE; tracking watts prevents budget overruns and shutdowns.
value: Validates switch upgrades before adding 4K heads.
implementation: (1) SNMP or VMS-supplied PoE telemetry. (2) Compare to class budget.
grandmaExplanation: We watch how much power each camera port uses so switches are not overloaded.
